extract: Sandstorm has several referrals: For the type of weather which damages all Pokémon that are not Rock-, Ground-, or Steel-type, see Sandstorm (weather condition) For the move that activates the above weather condition, see Sandstorm (move) For the second Pokémon Trading Card Game expansion of the Generation III era, see EX Sandstorm For the Pokémon whose English name was originally to be Sandstorm, see Sandslash For the twenty-first chapter of the Black & White arc, Sandstorm, see PS481
